owner_val_access_in_this_lane: the combined owner_102_manifest.json envelope was SHA-hashed and JSON-parsed, and validation split markers were counted while isolating the 61 train rows; no owner-41 event field was inspected, printed, scored, selected on, or tuned against
protected_50_access_in_this_lane: pre-existing legacy finetune tests parsed spot_check_tier_a_50.json for overlap validation before the access conflict was caught; the first reduced wide-suite attempt then byte-read spot_check_tier_a_50.json and owner_spot_check_results_20260715.json through test_audit_data_utilization.py's ledger SHA verifier before that transitive access was discovered. No protected scoring, training, thresholding, tuning, or manual label inspection occurred

transport_notes_20260723.eligibility_rule: swap only CACHE_MANIFEST rows whose flags include exact sha256_matches; SHA256_MISMATCH, QUARANTINED*, and COMPARE_ONLY_NEVER_TRAIN are ineligible regardless of any earlier snapshot claim
transport_notes_20260723.cache_swapped_path_contract: /cache/media/pbvision/<video_id>/max.mp4 symlinked to the unchanged registered /home/arnavchokshi/pbv_media_root/<video_id>/max.mp4 path and rehashed against sha256_by_video_id before use
transport_notes_20260723.explicitly_ineligible_example: 83gyqyc10y8f is not an E-v2 teacher clip and is excluded by its SHA256_MISMATCH plus COMPARE_ONLY_NEVER_TRAIN/quarantine posture
registered_transport_retained_verbatim: 40-MP4 owner rally-media universe via controller tar/SCP
Stage-P agreement manifest and agreement_decisions.jsonl via SCP
transport_notes_20260723.step_0_gate: before any training input read, RUN_COMMIT runs scripts/racketsport/verify_training_inputs.py from the separately reviewed Track-E safety revision and preserves a passing gate_proof.json with run artifacts; the exact reviewed revision SHA is filled by the serialized integration owner at dispatch time

stage_f_owner_manifest.registered_use: split=train only during training; split=val only once through frozen judge later

hard_negative_candidate_manifest.derivation: subtract the repaired Stage-P row identities

owner_media_universe.staging_policy: validate the SHA-pinned exact 38-train plus 2-validation RATE_MEDIA_LOCK before provisioning and after transfer, independent of owner-manifest fields; Stage F decodes all 38 train entries and verifies their frozen frame/duration facts; after token consumption Stage V manifest-verifies and decodes the same 2 validation media objects

sample_weight_discrepancy: The pinned repaired manifest has the requested 773 kink-only and 416 audio+kink family rows, but its effective weights are 803 at 0.25 and 386 at 0.5 because 30 audio matches did not pass the preregistered time-shift-null eligibility check. E-v2 consumes the pinned row sample_weight values and does not relabel those 30 as two-cue evidence.
